reasoning: Baxter (BAX) recently dropped to $29.75, despite beating Q1 2025 expectations and analysts noting a 25% upside potential. The seasonal and linear trend analysis from Yahoo Finance suggests a combined probability of 0.59 that the price will exceed $29.75 by June 29. The initial probability is anchored around this estimate, at 0.58, predicting a minor short-term rebound. As required by the forecasting instructions, probabilities decay closer to 0.50 as the time horizon increases. Additionally, upcoming ex-dividend dates (likely late August and late November) will nominally decrease the share price, offsetting normal equity risk premium drift, which further justifies long-term probabilities settling near a 50/50 chance.
